channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: A year after their breakup, New York garage-punkers Dog Date…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: A year after their breakup, New York garage-punkers Dog Date return with the new surprise release 'Perfectly'
item.content:encoded: A year after their breakup, New York garage-punkers Dog Date return with the new surprise release 'Perfectly'

item.title: @zohrankmamdani.bsky.social speaks about his political convi…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
@zohrankmamdani.bsky.social speaks about his political convictions:

“The more you’re in politics, the more you’re told this is just simply how it is. And to me, I just never think that’s a good enough answer.”

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
@zohrankmamdani.bsky.social speaks about his political convictions:

“The more you’re in politics, the more you’re told this is just simply how it is. And to me, I just never think that’s a good enough answer.”

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: Baritone sax master Colin Stetson and experimental bagpiper …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Baritone sax master Colin Stetson and experimental bagpiper Brìghde Chaimbeul announced a new collaborative album.

Its lead single sounds like rave music from an alien planet.
item.content:encoded:
Baritone sax master Colin Stetson and experimental bagpiper Brìghde Chaimbeul announced a new collaborative album.

Its lead single sounds like rave music from an alien planet.

item.title: A new study has found that 41% of adults have not listened t…
item.author: DJ Mag (@djmag.com)
item.description:
A new study has found that 41% of adults have not listened to an album from start to finish in the past year, while 8% say they have never listened to one in full 👂

djmag.com/news/almost-...
item.content:encoded:
A new study has found that 41% of adults have not listened to an album from start to finish in the past year, while 8% say they have never listened to one in full 👂

item.title: @zohrankmamdani.bsky.social on criticism of his views and hi…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
@zohrankmamdani.bsky.social on criticism of his views and his wife Rama Duwaji's on Gaza:

"It is hard to prepare for death threats… When you are willing to speak up for all people, there are consequences that come from it."

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
@zohrankmamdani.bsky.social on criticism of his views and his wife Rama Duwaji's on Gaza:

"It is hard to prepare for death threats… When you are willing to speak up for all people, there are consequences that come from it."

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: The movement, which began as a satirical protest, has evolve…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The movement, which began as a satirical protest, has evolved into a nationwide challenge to Prime Minister Narendra Modi's government. n.pr/3R6h8rH
item.content:encoded: The movement, which began as a satirical protest, has evolved into a nationwide challenge to Prime Minister Narendra Modi's government. n.pr/3R6h8rH

item.title: Only on Apple News: Rolling Stone presents Special Issue 002…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Only on Apple News: Rolling Stone presents Special Issue 002 with 5 true crime stories, including a deep dive into a teacher’s mysterious murder.

+ ‘A Hawaii Politican Breaks Bad’
+ 'The Rise and Fall of the QAnon Queen of Canada’
+ More

Read: apple.news/IDH7ewqgVRpS...
item.content:encoded:
Only on Apple News: Rolling Stone presents Special Issue 002 with 5 true crime stories, including a deep dive into a teacher’s mysterious murder.

+ ‘A Hawaii Politican Breaks Bad’
+ 'The Rise and Fall of the QAnon Queen of Canada’
+ More

Read: apple.news/IDH7ewqgVRpS...

item.title: Former DNC chair Jamie Harrison on primary night said: "If y…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Former DNC chair Jamie Harrison on primary night said: "If you hate the Democratic Party, then please don't run for our nomination."

Mayor Mamdani responded:

"The question that I come back to is 'What is the Democratic Party if not its voters?'"

More: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
Former DNC chair Jamie Harrison on primary night said: "If you hate the Democratic Party, then please don't run for our nomination."

Mayor Mamdani responded:

"The question that I come back to is 'What is the Democratic Party if not its voters?'"

More: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: Mayor Mamdani on Taylor Swift's NYC wedding: City services …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Mayor Mamdani on Taylor Swift's NYC wedding:

City services "acquitted themselves very well," he said — joking he thought he was asked if guests had fun: "I have no idea."

Asked if he was invited? The mayor laughed and said: "No. I'm fine."

More: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
Mayor Mamdani on Taylor Swift's NYC wedding:

City services "acquitted themselves very well," he said — joking he thought he was asked if guests had fun: "I have no idea."

Asked if he was invited? The mayor laughed and said: "No. I'm fine."

More: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: For many anglers, the practice of fly fishing is about much …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: For many anglers, the practice of fly fishing is about much more than catching fish. For some in addiction recovery it can be therapeutic. n.pr/4fqVR3X
item.content:encoded: For many anglers, the practice of fly fishing is about much more than catching fish. For some in addiction recovery it can be therapeutic. n.pr/4fqVR3X

item.title: Mayor Zohran Mamdani, who met Trump at the White House after…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Mayor Zohran Mamdani, who met Trump at the White House after his 2025 win, said their bond is New York City itself:

"For all of the many disagreements that the president and I have, we have one thing in common, which is a love of this place."

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
Mayor Zohran Mamdani, who met Trump at the White House after his 2025 win, said their bond is New York City itself:

"For all of the many disagreements that the president and I have, we have one thing in common, which is a love of this place."

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: Presenting The Rolling Stone Interview with Zohran Mamdani …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Presenting The Rolling Stone Interview with Zohran Mamdani

The NYC mayor talks about the future of the Democratic Party, what he's learned over his first six months in office, dealing with President Trump, Taylor Swift's wedding, and more.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
Presenting The Rolling Stone Interview with Zohran Mamdani

The NYC mayor talks about the future of the Democratic Party, what he's learned over his first six months in office, dealing with President Trump, Taylor Swift's wedding, and more.

item.title: “I want to see everything that was captured. I want to see t…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
“I want to see everything that was captured. I want to see the background actors, I want to see the environments. I want to see the props. Top to bottom, I want to see everything.”

Rolling Stone talked to the movie buffs who watched 'The Odyssey' at 3AM
item.content:encoded:
“I want to see everything that was captured. I want to see the background actors, I want to see the environments. I want to see the props. Top to bottom, I want to see everything.”

Rolling Stone talked to the movie buffs who watched 'The Odyssey' at 3AM

item.title: Titans like Resident Evil Requiem and Crimson Desert dominat…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Titans like Resident Evil Requiem and Crimson Desert dominated in the first half of the gaming year, with early-access sequels like Slay the Spire 2 and Subnautica 2 not far behind. n.pr/45e2RMG
item.content:encoded: Titans like Resident Evil Requiem and Crimson Desert dominated in the first half of the gaming year, with early-access sequels like Slay the Spire 2 and Subnautica 2 not far behind. n.pr/45e2RMG

item.title: Harrisburg is home to one of the nation's largest communitie…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Harrisburg is home to one of the nation's largest communities of Nepali-speaking Bhutanese refugees and their families. Through soccer, generations have found connection, belonging and a way to carry forward a shared history. n.pr/4wOHuxm
item.content:encoded: Harrisburg is home to one of the nation's largest communities of Nepali-speaking Bhutanese refugees and their families. Through soccer, generations have found connection, belonging and a way to carry forward a shared history. n.pr/4wOHuxm

item.title: Kroi内田怜央が走る、ワンカット撮影された最新曲「All in」MVの裏側公開（動画あり） https://nata…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
Kroi内田怜央が走る、ワンカット撮影された最新曲「All in」MVの裏側公開（動画あり）
https://natalie.mu/music/news/681832?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

アニメ「LIAR GAME」第2クールOPテーマ
